toast.noRollbackSnapshot: No rollback snapshot available (only one rollback per round)
toast.privacyFieldsIncomplete: {count} extended field(s) still incomplete (retry limit reached)
toast.rateLimitQueued: Low-load mode: request queued, estimated wait {seconds}s
toast.unknownPathRoot: AI wrote to unknown path root "{root}" — see console
toast.memoryPairMismatch: Short/implicit mid-term memory pairing mismatch ({short} vs {implicit}), possible round alignment loss
toast.imageTasksRecovered: {count} image generation task(s) interrupted by page refresh
toast.missingMidTermMemory: AI did not output mid-term memory for round {round}, placeholder inserted
toast.fieldRepairFailed: Field repair / memory maintenance failed (does not affect this round)
toast.missingFieldsDetected: Detected {count} missing extended field(s), will auto-populate
toast.storageNotPersisted: Browser did not grant persistent storage; saves may be cleared automatically when space runs low — please back up to the cloud soon
toast.storagePressure: Local storage is at {usedMB}MB / {quotaMB}MB (>85%). When space runs low the browser may auto-clear saves and images — please back up to the cloud soon
toast.storageQuotaExceeded: Browser storage is full and a write failed! Saves and images may be evicted at any time — back up to the cloud / export now
toast.imageAssetsMissingOnExport: This backup is missing {missing}/{total} referenced image(s) not found in the local cache (possibly cleared by the browser). Do NOT overwrite an image-bearing cloud/older backup with it
toast.importPreservedImages: The imported backup references images but contains no image data; kept your existing local images to prevent loss
toast.imageRestoreFailed: The save was restored, but writing images to local storage failed (storage may be full); some images may be missing
toast.ttsNoConfig: No usable voice (TTS) API configured — add a TTS-category endpoint under "API Config"
toast.ttsFailed: Voice synthesis failed (this round is unaffected)
